ITR-1.action: Sign in at incometax.gov.in with your PAN as user ID.
Click e-File in the top navigation bar.
Select Income Tax Return from the e-File submenu.

ITR-1.plainEnglish: The correct return form based on your income mix and business type.

ITR-1.action: Pick the applicable reason (e.g. taxable income exceeds basic exemption).
Verify PAN matches your card — pre-filled from account.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Your 10-character Permanent Account Number from your PAN card.
Used to determine senior-citizen slab benefits and 80TTB eligibility.

ITR-1.action: Select or add bank account for refund credit.
Select based on our regime recommendation.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Higher slabs but full Chapter VI-A deductions and HRA exemption.

ITR-1.action: Enter total salary from Form 16 Part-B.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Core salary component — used to calculate HRA exemption.
HRA, LTA, and other allowances exempt under Section 10.
Flat deduction from salary — ₹50,000 (old) or ₹75,000 (new regime).
State professional tax deducted from salary — fully deductible.

ITR-1.action: Enter LTA exempt amount if claimed.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: HRA, LTA, and other allowances exempt under Section 10.

ITR-1.action: Verify computed net salary head total.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Taxable salary after standard deduction, HRA/LTA exemptions, and professional tax.
Income or loss from owned property — rent minus 30% repairs minus home-loan interest.
Income or loss from owned property — rent minus 30% repairs minus home-loan interest.

ITR-1.action: Enter municipal tax paid on property.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Income or loss from owned property — rent minus 30% repairs minus home-loan interest.

ITR-1.action: Enter home-loan interest from bank certificate.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Interest paid on home loan — capped at ₹2 lakh for self-occupied property (old regime).

ITR-1.action: Verify net HP income (can be loss).
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Income or loss from owned property — rent minus 30% repairs minus home-loan interest.
Bank FD interest, savings interest, dividends, and family pension.
Bank FD interest, savings interest, dividends, and family pension.
Bank FD interest, savings interest, dividends, and family pension.
Bank FD interest, savings interest, dividends, and family pension.
Sum of all income heads before Chapter VI-A deductions.
EPF, PPF, ELSS, LIC, tuition fees, home-loan principal — combined cap ₹1.5 lakh.
Additional NPS contribution by you — extra ₹50,000 over and above 80C cap.

ITR-1.action: Enter employer NPS — allowed in both regimes.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Employer's NPS contribution — allowed in both old and new regime (up to 10% of basic).
Health insurance premium for self/family and parents — limits vary by age.
Deduction on savings account interest — up to ₹10,000 (below 60 years).
Deduction for taxpayer with disability — ₹75,000 or ₹1.25 lakh if severe.
Investments and expenses that reduce taxable income (old regime).
Gross total income minus deductions — your taxable income base.
Tax calculated on slab rates plus special-rate capital gains.
Tax rebate for lower incomes — up to ₹12,500 (old) or full rebate up to ₹12L (new).
4% surcharge on income tax and surcharge.
TDS from Form 16/26AS plus advance tax and self-assessment tax.
Amount you still owe after TDS credits.

ITR-1.action: Verify refund if TDS exceeds liability.
ITR-1.plainEnglish: Excess TDS/advance tax — money returned by the department.
Tax already deducted by employer, bank, or broker — matched against 26AS.
Tax already deducted by employer, bank, or broker — matched against 26AS.
Tax you paid directly via challan before filing.

Complete e-verify within 30 days via Aadhaar OTP or net banking.
